articles.description: “If there is an anti-BJP government here, we will support it. If we can become a part of it, then we will address the people's problems in the education sector, the health sector, and road communication," says AIUDF MLA

articles.title: ECI orders transfer of officials in Kerala ahead of Assembly polls
articles.description: The ECI also said that officers who have been transferred out should not be posted in any election-related assignments till the completion of the poll process

articles.title: Delhi Metro is world's cheapest among top 10 networks
articles.description: Delhi Metro is worlds cheapest among top  networks

articles.title: Sudhakaran firm on contesting assembly polls despite Congress’s stand

topStories.title: Lok Sabha revokes suspension of 8 opposition MPs
topStories.description: On February 3, seven Congress MPs and one CPI(M) MP were suspended for unruly behaviour following a resolution passed by the Lok Sabha during the first part of the Budget session

topStories.description: Donald Trump's Board of Peace - a peacebuilding project to underline his Nobel Prize credentials -  has gone silent amid his Iran war and continued fighting in Gaza consumes the MIddle East.

topStories.title: Supreme Court nine-judge Constitution Bench commences hearing on definition of 'industry'
topStories.description: Attorney General R. Venkataramani is advancing his submissions in the matter. On February 16, the court formulated the broad issues to be adjudicated by the nine-judge Bench

topStories.title: NIA court remands 7 foreigners, including Ukrainians and US citizen, to 11-day custody
topStories.description: Special NIA Court at Patiala House Court remanded 6 foreigners for 11 days of National Investigation Agency (NIA) custody.

topStories.title: Minnesota bill would ban warrants allowing police to collect data from devices near a crime scene
topStories.description: Minnesota lawmakers proposed a bill to ban reverse location warrants allowing police to collect cellphone data near crime scenes, which they say violates the Fourth Amendment.

dailyNews.title: Venezuela comes from behind to beat Italy, earn WBC final spot vs Team USA
dailyNews.description: Venezuela staged a dramatic comeback to defeat Italy, 4-2, at loanDepot park, advancing to World Baseball Classic final against Team USA on Tuesday night.

dailyNews.title: Jasmine Crockett defends her security guard who was killed in police standoff, wanted for impersonating cop
dailyNews.description: Rep. Jasmine Crockett's security guard killed in a SWAT standoff was accused of impersonating police, and the congresswoman defended him despite his lengthy rap sheet.

dailyNews.title: MLB upholds 80-game suspension for Phillies' Johan Rojas after appeal
dailyNews.description: Phillies outfielder Johan Rojas will serve his 80-game MLB suspension despite an appeal after testing positive for a performance-enhancing drug.

dailyNews.title: 'Back to the Future' actor Matt Clark dead at 89
dailyNews.description: Matt Clark, beloved "Back to the Future Part III" bartender Chester, has died at 89, his family confirmed to Fox News Digital.

dailyNews.title: Cuba's entire electrical grid collapses, leaving whole island without power
dailyNews.description: Cuba's power grid suffers total collapse amid fuel shortages and sanctions, leaving the island nation scrambling to restore electricity to millions.

dailyNews.title: Progressive group appears to advocate for illegal immigrants to be eligible for guaranteed income programs
dailyNews.description: A progressive group that's pushing for guaranteed income programs also wants to ensure that even illegal immigrants get basic economic protections.

dailyNews.title: Rex Culpepper, former Syracuse quarterback, dead at 28 from injuries in Georgia dirt bike crash
dailyNews.description: Former Syracuse quarterback Rex Culpepper, tragically died in a dirt bike accident weeks after proposing to his fiancee, who confirmed the heartbreaking news.

dailyNews.title: Anti-ICE agitators blow cover in Boston, allowing child rape suspect to evade arrest for weeks
dailyNews.description: Activists in Boston compromised an ICE operation, allowing a Salvadoran fugitive wanted for child rape to evade capture for a month, Fox News has learned.

dailyNews.title: Utah children’s book author Kouri Richins convicted in husband’s murder
dailyNews.description: Mother of three allegedly murdered husband for $2M life insurance payout. Prosecutors say she was $7.5M in debt before his fentanyl poisoning death.

dailyNews.title: Irish Prime Minister Taoiseach Micheál Martin addresses how Europe feels about US-Iran conflict
dailyNews.description: Irish Prime Minister Micheál Martin discusses European perceptions of U.S.-Iran conflict ahead of Trump meeting, advocating for diplomatic solutions over military action.

dailyNews.title: Jane Fonda slams Paramount-WBD merger, warns CNN will 'have to cave' to Trump
dailyNews.description: Actress Jane Fonda protested the Paramount merger at an Oscars after-party, warning about the Trump administration's potential political influence over CNN.

dailyNews.title: Search for missing retired Air Force general enters third week as investigators probe new clues
dailyNews.description: Hiking boots believed to belong to missing retired Air Force Maj. Gen. William McCasland found at vacation home as search continues into second week.

topStories.title: Trump questions Newsom’s fitness for White House, citing his dyslexia
topStories.description: After Gov. Gavin Newsom admitted to having a 960 SAT score and dyslexia, Trump questioned his fitness for office and accused him of talking down to Black audiences.

topStories.title: Trump lawyer in Jack Smith case draws conservative backing after DOJ praise rattles 'elite' legal conference
topStories.description: John Lauro told a conference that the DOJ was "in a better place" under Trump, prompting criticism from conference attendees.

topStories.title: Europe Rejects Trump’s Demands for Warships to Reopen the Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: While some European countries said they were discussing ways to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, several rejected President Trump’s calls to send warships.

topStories.title: What the Iran War Means for the U.S.-China Relationship
topStories.description: With the Xi-Trump summit almost certainly delayed, and tensions rising over the war in Iran, vital issues for both the U.S. and China are also being cast into uncertainty.

topStories.title: Cuba Ready to Accept Outside Investment, Top Official Says
topStories.description: President Trump’s words came amid a nationwide blackout and as a top Cuban official said his country would move to open the economy to foreign investors.

topStories.title: Trump Administration Seeks to Remove Cuba’s President From Power During Negotiations
topStories.description: The United States has told Cuba that for meaningful progress to be made in negotiations, President Miguel Díaz-Canel must step down, said people familiar with the talks.

topStories.title: Oil Begins Flowing Through California Pipeline Under Trump Order
topStories.description: Oil had not flowed through the pipeline since a 2015 rupture caused an environmental disaster on California’s Central Coast. It sets up a new fight between the Trump administration and state officials.

dailyNews.title: War Isn’t the Only Thing on Trump’s Mind
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke to journalists for about 40 minutes before holding a news conference on Monday, offering a glimpse into his priorities.

dailyNews.title: Judge Strikes Down RFK Jr.’s Vaccine Policies in Blow to Trump’s Health Agenda
dailyNews.description: Ruling on a lawsuit brought by several prominent medical organizations, a district court said the federal government had not based its decisions on science in limiting Covid shots and revising the childhood immunization schedule.

dailyNews.title: Richard Grenell: From Trump Cabinet Hopeful to Ex-Kennedy Center Manager
dailyNews.description: Richard Grenell once hoped to be President Trump’s secretary of state. Instead, Mr. Trump just replaced him as Kennedy Center president.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Dangerous Lack of a Strategy in Iran
dailyNews.description: The early reality of the Iran war is not cooperating with President Trump’s bluster.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Destroyed the Aura of the Wartime President
dailyNews.description: Even as he’s wrecking American institutions, he is revealing the limits of his cultural influence.

dailyNews.title: Jimmy Kimmel Has a Bone to Pick With Trump’s War Plans
dailyNews.description: “The only war Trump had an exit plan for was Vietnam,” Kimmel remarked after the president said he would end the war in Iran when he “feels it in his bones.”

dailyNews.title: Iran war keeps Strait of Hormuz paralyzed and gas prices on the rise
dailyNews.description: The Iran war could escalate further as President Trump threatens to hit key oil infrastructure if Tehran doesn't drop its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: 3/9: Face the Nation
dailyNews.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," after a whiplash week of on-again, off-again tariff announcements, Canadian ambassador to the U.S. Kirsten Hillman joins to discuss the costs and consequences of a trade war. Plus, former White House Russia expert Fiona Hill discusses President Trump's diplomatic pivot on Ukraine.

dailyNews.title: Alleged pipe bomber argues charges should be tossed under Jan. 6 pardons
dailyNews.description: A man who was accused of planting pipe bombs outside the RNC and DNC on the eve of the Jan. 6 attack is arguing he is covered by President Trump's sweeping pardons of alleged Jan. 6 rioters.

dailyNews.title: 3/16: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump calls for other countries to help open Strait of Hormuz; White House chief of staff Susie Wiles diagnosed with breast cancer.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks parts of RFK Jr.'s vaccine agenda, including revised schedule
dailyNews.description: A judge blocked a set of changes to the childhood vaccine schedule recommended by allies of Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, dealing a setback to the Trump administration's efforts to overhaul federal vaccine policy.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. asked China to delay Xi meeting 'a month or so' due to Iran war
dailyNews.description: The Iran war wasn't expected to derail the Trump-Xi meeting in China, but analysts said it would influence the talks and any agreements that come out of them.
